appliedRows.title: Dario Amodei
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Dario Amodei is the CEO of Anthropic... Previously, Dario served as Vice President of Research at OpenAI... Selection reason: 本人官方主页，直接证明其身份、职位及背景，是最高级别的权威来源。 Source preview: Dario Amodei Dario AmodeiArchive [x] Dario Amodei is the CEO of Anthropic, a public benefit corporation dedicated to building AI systems that are steerable, interpretable and safe.... More Previously, Dario served as Vice President of Research at OpenAI, where he led the development of large language models like GPT-2 and GPT-3. He is also the co-inventor of reinforcement learning from human feedback. Before joining OpenAI, he worked at Google Brain as a Senior Research Scientist. Dario earned his doctorate degree in biophysics from Princeton University as a Hertz Fellow, and was a postdoctoral scholar at the Stanford University School of Medicine. Essays The Adolescence of Technology Machi... appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: JO LING KENT: You are Dario Amodei, the CEO of Anthropic. Is that right? DARIO AMODEI: That's correct, yes. See below for the full transcript: JO LING KENT: All right. Thank you for doing this with us today. DARIO AMODEI: Thank-- thanks for having me. JO LING KENT: We appreciate you taking the time. You are Dario Amodei, the CEO of Anthropic. Is that right? DARIO AMODEI: That's correct, yes. JO LING KENT:... appliedRows.title: Dario Amodei - Stanford Digital Economy Lab
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Dario Amodei is chief executive officer and co-founder of Anthropic... Previously Dario was vice president of research at OpenAI... Selection reason: 斯坦福大学官方机构资料页，权威性高，明确列出其职位及在OpenAI的过往经历。 Source preview: Economics of Transformative AI New Measures of the Economy Digital Platforms and Society AI Agents Dario Amodei CEO and Co-Founder, Anthropic Dario Amodei is chief executive officer and co-founder of Anthropic, an artificial intelligence (AI) safety and research company working to build reliable, interpretable and steerable AI systems. Previously Dario was vice president of research at OpenAI, during which he set the overall research direction at the organization, led the efforts to build GPT-2 and GPT-3, and led several teams focused on long-term safety research, including how to make AI systems more interpretable and how to embed human preferences and values in future powerful AI systems.... appliedRows.title: Guillaume Lample
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Guillaume Lample cofounded Mistral AI in 2023... The French AI researcher met his future cofounder Arthur Mensch while studying at Paris' elite college École Polytechnique. Selection reason: 福布斯权威资料页，明确说明其为Mistral AI联合创始人及背景，可补强原来源。 Source preview: PROFILE Guillaume Lample $1.8B Real Time Net Worth as of 6/9/26 Reflects change since 5 pm ET of prior trading day. #2275 in the world today From the Editor Last Updated Mar 10, 2026, 1:01am EDT Guillaume Lample cofounded Mistral AI in 2023 raising $113 million from investors in what was then Europe's largest ever seed round. ​​The Paris-based company builds open-weight large language models that compete with U.S. rivals like OpenAI, and raised $2 billion on a $14 billion valuation in September 2025. The French AI researcher met his future cofounder Arthur Mensch while studying at Paris' elite college École Polytechnique. Lample would later complete a master's degree in artificial intellige... MiMo rationale: 原来源内容缺失，需替换或补强。福布斯资料页权威且直接证明其联合创始人身份，LinkedIn主页可作为辅助。两者均符合要求，可共同补强证据。 Evidence requirements: Source must name Guillaume Lample directly. | Source must support why "Guillaume Lample - Co-founder Chief Scientist | Prog. ..." belongs on this person's page, or provide a better authoritative replacement. | Prefer official profile, institution/company page, paper detail page, author page, interview transcript, or reliable media with clear attribution. | Do not use search pages, login walls, empty captures, generic product pages without person role, or social snippets without context as replace_source. appliedRows.title: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models - Meta AI
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: AUTHORS Written by... Selection reason: Meta AI官方论文页面，明确列出Guillaume Lample为作者，权威且直接证明其贡献。 Source preview: Meta Products AI Research Resources About Get Llama Try Meta AI LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models February 24, 2023 Abstract We introduce LLaMA, a collection of founda- tion language models ranging from 7B to 65B parameters. We train our models on trillions of tokens, and show that it is possible to train state-of-the-art models using publicly available datasets exclusively, without resorting to proprietary and inaccessible datasets. In particular, LLaMA-13B outperforms GPT-3 (175B) on most benchmarks, and LLaMA-65B is competitive with the best models, Chinchilla- 70B and PaLM-540B. We release all our models to the research community. Download the Paper AUTHORS Written by... MiMo rationale: Meta AI官方论文页面是LLaMA论文的权威发布源，明确列出Guillaume Lample为作者，直接证明其与论文的关系，符合证据要求。其他候选来源要么权威性不足，要么无法直接证明作者身份。 Evidence requirements: Source must name Guillaume Lample directly. | Source must support why "Paper page - LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models" belongs on this person's page, or provide a better authoritative replacement. | Prefer official profile, institution/company page, paper detail page, author page, interview transcript, or reliable media with clear attribution. | Do not use search pages, login walls, empty captures, generic product pages without person role, or social snippets without context as replace_source. appliedRows.title: [PDF] arXiv:1901.07291v1 [cs.CL] 22 Jan 2019
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Cross-lingual Language Model Pretraining Guillaume Lample∗ Facebook AI Research Sorbonne Universit´ es glample@fb.com Selection reason: 权威论文详情页，明确列出作者Guillaume Lample及其所属机构Facebook AI Research，直接证明其研究身份。 Source preview: Cross-lingual Language Model Pretraining Guillaume Lample∗ Facebook AI Research Sorbonne Universit´ es glample@fb.com Alexis Conneau∗ Facebook AI Research Universit´ e Le Mans aconneau@fb.com Abstract Recent studies have demonstrated the ef-ﬁciency of generative pretraining for En-glish natural language understanding. In this work, we extend this approach to mul-tiple languages and show the effectiveness of cross-lingual pretraining. We propose two methods to learn cross-lingual lan-guage models (XLMs): one unsupervised that only relies on monolingual data, and one supervised that leverages parallel data with a new cross-lingual language model objective. We obtain state-of-the-art re-sults ... appliedRows.title: [PDF] Language Models are Unsupervised Multitask Learners | OpenAI
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: Language Models are Unsupervised Multitask Learners Alec Radford 1 Jeffrey Wu 1 Rewon Child 1 David Luan 1 Dario Amodei 1 Ilya Sutskever 1 Selection reason: OpenAI官方PDF，明确列出Alec Radford为第一作者，直接证明其在OpenAI的核心研究贡献。 Source preview: Language Models are Unsupervised Multitask Learners Alec Radford 1 Jeffrey Wu 1 Rewon Child 1 David Luan 1 Dario Amodei 1 Ilya Sutskever 1 Abstract Natural language processing tasks, such as ques-tion answering, machine translation, reading com-prehension, and summarization, are typically approached with supervised learning on task-speciﬁc datasets. We demonstrate that language models begin to learn these tasks without any ex-plicit supervision when trained on a new dataset of millions of webpages called WebText. When conditioned on a document plus questions, the an-swers generated by the language model reach 55 F1 on the CoQA dataset - matching or exceeding the performance of 3 out of 4 ba... appliedRows.title: Jeffrey Dean - Google Research
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: I joined Google in mid-1999, and I'm currently Google's Chief Scientist, focusing on AI advances for Google DeepMind and Google Research. Selection reason: 谷歌官方研究页面，明确列出杰夫·迪恩的职位（首席科学家）和研究领域，是权威的一手来源。 Source preview: Google Research Jeffrey Dean I joined Google in mid-1999, and I'm currently Google's Chief Scientist, focusing on AI advances for Google DeepMind and Google Research. My areas of focus include machine learning and AI and applications of AI to problems that help billions of people in societally beneficial ways. I have a broad variety of interests, including machine learning, large-scale distributed systems, computer systems performance, compression techniques, information retrieval, application of machine learning to search and other related problems, microprocessor architecture, compiler optimizations, and the development of new products that organize information in new and interesting ways... A leading computer scientist, Vaswani previously worked for Google Brain and interned at IBM. He is one of the main inventors of the Transformer, the model that underpins Generative AI. Ashish co-authored the paper presenting the Transformer, which has been cited more than 50,000 times, leading to the capabilities of models such as GPT, Google’s BERT, Microsoft’s MT-DNN. His work has also advanced state-of-the-art in computer vision, DNA sequence correction, image and music generation, and has enabled the unification of machine learning with the Tr...
